# PC Workman

> Free, open-source Windows system monitor with a built-in offline AI assistant (hck_GPT, 82 intents, Polish + English). Learns your hardware's normal temperatures per workload, runs SPC on voltage rails (Median+MAD, Nelson rules), detects ghost drivers via pnputil, and ships a TURBO optimization suite. Built solo and in public by Marcin Firmuga (HCK_Labs). No cloud, no account, no telemetry — everything runs locally.

Current version line: 1.7.9. Python 3.9+ / Tkinter, Windows 10/11 only. License: MIT.

## Main pages

- [Landing (English)](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/index_en.html): features, hck_GPT 9-layer logic, comparisons, FAQ
- [Landing (Polish)](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/index.html): pełny opis po polsku
- [Download](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/download/): latest release, requirements, Sigstore signing, security notes
- [Security Report](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/SECURITY_report.html): release verification and audit

## Blog (build in public)

- [Blog hub](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/): three weekly series, archive
- [Monday Grind Blueprint](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/monday-grind-blueprint/): the week's plan, announced before the work starts
- [Wednesday Code Autopsy](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/wednesday-code-autopsy/): one bug or feature dissected — root cause, dead ends, fix
- [Friday Shipped & Scarred](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/friday-shipped-scarred/): Monday's plan vs Friday's reality
- [The Story](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/story_en.html): from warehouse night shifts and a 94°C laptop to a homemade AI
- [RSS feed](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/blog/feed.xml)

## Guides (how-tos by the developer)

- [Guides hub](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/guides/): Windows performance explained honestly, EN + PL
- [What's a normal CPU temperature?](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/guides/normal-cpu-temperature/): per-workload reference ranges, when "normal" is a warning
- [Ghost drivers in Windows](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/guides/ghost-drivers-windows/): finding and removing drivers of hardware you no longer own, via pnputil
- [Jak przyspieszyć komputer (PL)](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/guides/jak-przyspieszyc-komputer/): real speed-ups in the right order, myths debunked
- [Które usługi Windows wyłączyć (PL)](https://huckler2003.github.io/PC_Workman_HCK/guides/ktore-uslugi-windows-wylaczyc/): safe-to-disable services list with a critical-services whitelist

## Source & releases

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/HuckleR2003/PC_Workman_HCK): full source code, issues, discussions
- [Releases](https://github.com/HuckleR2003/PC_Workman_HCK/releases): signed ZIP builds
- [Changelog](https://github.com/HuckleR2003/PC_Workman_HCK/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): per-file change history
